pos_examples: Now, therapist respiratory_therapist bastion confirms setup with adapter_kit dress_red for patient_encounter object_50.
Once you are done, please assign nursing_team obj_15 and grant approval for patient_encounter object_50 with oxygen_source_unit socket and patient_interface_device frame_9.
First, release patient_interface_device frame_9 from patient_encounter object_50 and then finalize encounter for patient_encounter object_50 with monitoring activated.
The next step is to therapist respiratory_therapist bastion attaches adapter_kit dress_red for finalization of patient_encounter object_50.
